raw:
{
  "relations": [
    {
      "type": "equation_based",
      "source": ["D", "t"],
      "target": "x_s",
      "equation_id": "p4_eq5",
      "relation_type": "depends_on",
      "direction": "positive",
      "description": "Penetration length (x_s) depends positively on the effective diffusion coefficient (D) and time (t) as x_s = sqrt(D t)."
    },
    {
      "type": "mechanistic_text",
      "source": "diffusion",
      "target": "growth kinetics/penetration depth",
      "equation_id": null,
      "relation_type": "limits",
      "direction": "unknown",
      "description": "Diffusion of reactant in the channel limits the propagation of ALD growth and thus penetration depth."
    },
    {
      "type": "mechanistic_text",
      "source": "surface coverage (θ)",
      "target": "partial pressure of reactant (p_A)",
      "equation_id": null,
      "relation_type": "increases_with",
      "direction": "positive",
      "description": "Surface coverage increases with reactant partial pressure p_A, as evident from the Langmuir model equations and thickness profile integration."
    },
    {
      "type": "mechanistic_text",
      "source": "adsorption rate",
      "target": "concentration (partial pressure p_A)",
      "equation_id": null,
      "relation_type": "proportional_to",
      "direction": "positive",
      "description": "The adsorption rate is proportional to the available reactant concentration/partial pressure p_A (typical in Langmuir kinetics)."
    },
    {
      "type": "mechanistic_text",
      "source": "film thickness",
      "target": "position x (in channel)",
      "equation_id": null,
      "relation_type": "decreases_with",
      "direction": "negative",
      "description": "Film thickness decreases with increasing distance x from the channel entrance due to reactant depletion along the channel."
    },
    {
      "type": "mechanistic_text",
      "source": ["geometry H", "W", "aspect ratio a"],
      "target": "reactant flux/diffusion",
      "equation_id": null,
      "relation_type": "influences",
      "direction": "unknown",
      "description": "Channel geometry (height H, width W, and aspect ratio a) influences the diffusion flux and conformality profile."
    },
    {
      "type": "mechanistic_text",
      "source": "sticking coefficient (c)",
      "target": "coverage profile",
      "equation_id": null,
      "relation_type": "controls",
      "direction": "unknown",
      "description": "The sticking coefficient controls the shape and steepness of the coverage profile along the LHAR channel."
    },
    {
      "type": "equation_based",
      "source": ["H", "W", "D", "k"],
      "target": "F(x, t)",
      "equation_id": "p4_eq3",
      "relation_type": "defines",
      "direction": "unknown",
      "description": "Gas flow F(x,t) through the channel is defined by geometry (H, W), diffusion coefficient (D), and rate constant (k)."
    },
    {
      "type": "equation_based",
      "source": ["H", "W", "D_eff", "k_B", "T", "∂p_A/∂x"],
      "target": "F(x, t)",
      "equation_id": "p4_eq6",
      "relation_type": "defines",
      "direction": "unknown",
      "description": "F(x, t), the flux at x and time t, is defined by the channel geometry, effective diffusion coefficient, temperature, and local pressure gradient."
    },
    {
      "type": "equation_based",
      "source": ["q", "W", "θ", "x"],
      "target": "N",
      "equation_id": "p4_eq8",
      "relation_type": "defines",
      "direction": "positive",
      "description": "The total number of adsorbed molecules N up to position x is positively dependent on the integral of surface coverage θ and factors q, W."
    },
    {
      "type": "equation_based",
      "source": ["q", "W", "K", "p_A0", "x_s", "x"],
      "target": "N",
      "equation_id": "p4_eq10",
      "relation_type": "defines",
      "direction": "unknown",
      "description": "The explicit expression for N includes dependence on adsorption equilibrium, geometry, pressure, and position."
    },
    {
      "type": "equation_based",
      "source": ["cQ", "q", "p_A", "P_d"],
      "target": "θ(t)",
      "equation_id": "p5_eq0",
      "relation_type": "defines",
      "direction": "unknown",
      "description": "Surface coverage θ(t) is governed by a differential equation involving sticking coefficient (c), collision rate (Q), saturation density (q), local p_A, and desorption probability (P_d)."
    },
    {
      "type": "equation_based",
      "source": "b_film",
      "target": "q",
      "equation_id": "p3_eq9",
      "relation_type": "defines",
      "direction": "unknown",
      "description": "The ratio q = b_film / b_A defines q in terms of areal densities of film and molecule A."
    },
    {
      "type": "equation_equation",
      "source": "p4_eq6",
      "target": "p4_eq7",
      "equation_id": null,
      "relation_type": "derived_from",
      "direction": "unknown",
      "description": "Equation p4_eq7 is an approximation or further formulation based on p4_eq6."
    },
    {
      "type": "equation_equation",
      "source": "p4_eq8",
      "target": "p4_eq10",
      "equation_id": null,
      "relation_type": "derived_from",
      "direction": "unknown",
      "description": "p4_eq10 gives a more detailed evaluation or solution to the integral for N in p4_eq8/p4_eq9."
    },
    {
      "type": "mechanistic_text",
      "source": ["diffusion", "surface reaction (adsorption/desorption)"],
      "target": "film conformality profile",
      "equation_id": null,
      "relation_type": "governs",
      "direction": "unknown",
      "description": "The combined effect of diffusion and surface reaction kinetics determines the ALD film conformality profile in LHAR structures."
    }
  ]
}
